perks.name: Weapon Mastery
perks.description: Your improved fighting techniques allow you to swing one-handed weapons or fists with less effort and deal more damage. [20% more melee damage]

perks.name: Weapon Mastery
perks.description: Your improved fighting techniques increase your damage dealt with one-handed weapons or fists greatly. [40% more melee damage]

perks.name: Penetrating Strikes
perks.description: Your power attacks with one-handed weapons or fists are now devastating enough to penetrate enemy armor and less exhausting. [-30% power attack stamina cost, +30% armor penetration]

perks.name: Powerful Strike
perks.description: You know how to put the maximum force into your power attacks. [20% more power attack damage, +10% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Relentless Onslaught
perks.description: While attacking a target, build up momentum for a decisive strike. [Each normal attack with one-handed weapons increases power attack damage on target by 10% for 5s. Stacks up to six times (three while dual-wielding).]

perks.name: Powerful Charge
perks.description: You have learned to perform a leaping power attack while sprinting. [Able to do sprinting power attack which has a 50% critical hit chance]

perks.name: War Axe Focus
perks.description: You've become familiar with war axes. [Attacks deal 10-30 extra damage over 20 seconds scaling with weapon skill, +10% armor penetration]

perks.name: War Axe Focus
perks.description: You've become an advanced war axe fighter. [Attacks deal 20-60 extra damage over 20 seconds scaling with weapon skill, +20% armor penetration]

perks.name: War Axe Focus
perks.description: You've become a master of war axe combat. [Attacks deal 30-90 extra damage over 20 seconds scaling with weapon skill, +30% armor penetration]

perks.name: Mace Focus
perks.description: You've learned some techniques to crush armor with maces. [5% more power attack damage, +15% armor penetration]

perks.name: Mace Focus
perks.description: You've become an advanced mace fighter and know how to find weak spots in enemy armor. [10% more power attack damage, +30% armor penetration]

perks.name: Mace Focus
perks.description: You've become a masterly mace fighter, rendering armor almost useless. [15% more power attack damage, +45% armor penetration]

perks.name: Sword & Spear Focus
perks.description: You've learned the basics of using 1 handed swords, spears, javelins, rapiers and katanas. [Attacks reduce target's melee damage by 11% for 10 seconds, +11% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Sword & Spear Focus
perks.description: You've acquired the advanced techniques of using 1 handed swords and spears. [Attacks reduce target's melee damage by 22% for 10 seconds, +22% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Sword & Spear Focus
perks.description: You've become a master of using 1 handed swords and spears. [Attacks reduce target's melee damage by 33% for 10 seconds, +33% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Flurry
perks.description: When fighting with dual or single one-handed weapons or fists, you are able to hit enemy weak points better. [+10% critical hit chance and critical damage]

perks.name: Flurry
perks.description: When fighting with dual or single one-handed weapons or fists, you're able to hit enemy weak points even better. [+20% critical hit chance and critical damage]

perks.name: Storm of Steel
perks.description: You've mastered the art of using multiple weapons in combat. [50% more dual-wield power attack poise damage with any weapon and 25% more power attack damage]

perks.name: Hand to Hand
perks.description: You are trained in hand to hand combat, and can effectively disable opponents with bare hands. [+25 unarmed damage, unarmed attacks damage target stamina by half the unarmed damage]

perks.name: Short Blade Focus
perks.description: You learned some dirty tricks for your dagger or tanto. [+20% damage from behind, 2x irresistible sneak attack damage, +5% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Short Blade Focus
perks.description: A dagger or tanto in your hand turns into a deadly weapon. [+40% damage from behind, 3x irresistible sneak attack damage, +10% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Short Blade Focus
perks.description: You have mastered the deadly art of daggers and tantos. [+60% damage from behind, 4x irresistible sneak attack damage, +15% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Piercing Strike
perks.description: Your well placed strikes allow you to find the weak points of enemy defenses. [Attacks ignore 10% armor rating and deal 50% more poise damage]

perks.name: Stunning Blow
perks.description: You can cause stunning impact to targets that fail to block, knocking them down to the ground. [unblocked power attacks with maces knock down targets by 10% chance, 25% more damage against staggered targets]

perks.name: Armsbreaker
perks.description: Blade of your war axe can carve into target's weapons and shields, weakening their damage and protection. [power attacks with war axes reduce target's attack damage by 10% and blockable damage by 80% for 10 seconds]

perks.name: Puncture
perks.description: You can aim for critical weak points, dealing even more damage. [2x critical damage and +25% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Grappling
perks.description: You can grapple opponents to disarm or immobilize them. [unarmed power attacks stagger targets by 50% chance and disarm by 10% chance]

perks.name: Takedown
perks.description: You can knock down enemies by grappling. [unarmed power attacks knock down targets by 10% chance]

perks.name: Unarmed Defense
perks.description: You can defend yourself better even without weapons or shields. [15% less physical damage taken for each hand empty]

perks.name: Unarmed Stance
perks.description: While unarmed, you can maneuver more freely and resist physical force. [+5% movement speed for each hand empty, +50 mass when both hands are empty]

perks.name: Balanced Wielding
perks.description: You can balance your weapon better when wielding it in a single hand, delivering quick and precise attacks. [+25% damage against enemies who are attacking and +15% armor penetration when left hand is empty]

perks.name: Armed Spellcasting
perks.description: You can balance your weapon well with single hand, and can use it to cast magic. [+25% poise damage and 10% stronger spells, scrolls and enchants left hand is empty or wielding magic]

perks.name: Final Stand
perks.description: Attacks deal up to 200% more damage below 90% Health. The damage bonus increases as your Health decreases.

perks.name: Heavy Slam
perks.description: Whenever a standing power attack with a mace inflicts a critical strike, it deals 3% more critical damage per point of Stamina.

perks.name: Guillotine
perks.description: Standing power attacks with war axes execute targets below 25% Health, delivering a critical strike that deals twenty times critical damage.

perks.name: Death Adder
perks.description: Forward power attacks with a dagger ignore 25% of armor.

perks.name: Deathbringer
perks.description: Your barbaric instincts strengthen as you or your foe meet their end. [Your one-handed power attacks deal up to 100% more damage based on the difference between your health and your target's health]
